design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. The app marries the calm, trustworthy aesthetics of an earthy home interior with the high-tech precision of AI-driven logistics. Expect tactile bento grids, off-white warmth, and sudden contrasting dark-mode moments for live tracking.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-stone-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold text-stone-900

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first priority. Generous spacing to breathe. The bento grid dominates the service catalog to create rhythm.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-lg mx-auto md:max-w-2xl lg:max-w-5xl px-4 sm:px-6 py-8

surface_styles.header_nav: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-stone-200/50
surface_styles.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-t border-stone-200/50
surface_styles.service_card: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-3xl p-5 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
surface_styles.tracking_card: bg-black border border-stone-800 rounded-3xl p-6 overflow-hidden relative

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity and slight y-axis slide (initial { opacity: 0, y: 10 })
motion.live_route: Framer motion SVG path tracing (strokeDasharray & strokeDashoffset) with blur-md filter for glow effect

components.buttons: rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all active:scale-95
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, heavily customized: rounded-2xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-800/20 focus:border-green-800
components.badges: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold bg-green-100 text-green-800
components.map_visualizer: Use Mapbox GL or custom dark-themed SVG map. Overlay a glowing animated SVG path. Add 'Tracing Beam' border around the map card.

hero_background.description: Sunlit modern interior, use as faded background for the header or welcome dashboard area.

ai_map_route.description: Abstract futuristic dark map route with glowing amber neon line.
ai_map_route.usage: Use as map placeholder or background texture for the live tracking dashboard.

upi_qr_concept.description: 3D clay style illustration of a smartphone with a UPI QR code.
upi_qr_concept.usage: Show on the payment confirmation or UPI scanning screen as an illustration element.

service_icons_3d.description: Collection of 3D minimalist icons for home services.
service_icons_3d.usage: Use to extract or conceptually represent the premium 3D aesthetic of service icons in the bento grid.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='book-service-kitchen-btn'

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). Base app background is #FAFAF9. Do not use generic SaaS blues.
Implement the home dashboard with a 'Bento Grid' displaying 15 services (kitchen, cleaning, laundry, etc.).

For the Live Tracking Map, build a custom dark UI card (#0A0A0A) that strongly contrasts with the light app theme. Use framer-motion to trace an SVG neon amber path over it to simulate AI live tracking.
Ensure all routing and UI feels like a seamless hybrid app for mobile users (use a fixed bottom nav).
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tabs, and modals but strip the generic Vercel look by applying rounded-3xl borders, warm earthy colors, and soft shadows.
Never use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided asset URLs exactly as listed in the assets section.
